body:
Task: Fix the SQLite approval pending-ordering regression so the workspace can go green again. Keep ordering semantics deterministic across backends; if the correct rule is  or similar, encode it in code/tests and update the assumption doc only if the rule was previously implicit. Success criteria: 
running 16 tests
test sqlite_parity::cursor_remains_stable_across_later_appends ... ok
test sqlite_parity::latest_root_run_returns_most_recent ... ok
test sqlite_parity::child_task_lookup_by_parent_run ... ok
test sqlite_parity::checkpoint_list_ordering_is_deterministic ... ok
test sqlite_parity::list_queries_return_deterministic_ordering ... ok
test sqlite_parity::approval_list_ordering_is_deterministic ... ok
test sqlite_parity::mailbox_list_ordering_is_deterministic ... ok
test sqlite_parity::rebuild_preserves_tool_invocation_list_ordering ... ok
test sqlite_parity::run_list_ordering_is_deterministic ... ok
test sqlite_parity::task_approval_projection_survives_replay ... ok
test sqlite_parity::tool_invocation_projection_parity ... ok
test sqlite_parity::rebuild_from_event_stream_produces_identical_state ... ok
test sqlite_parity::event_positions_are_monotonic_in_both_backends ... ok
test sqlite_parity::head_position_is_consistent ... ok
test sqlite_parity::cursor_replay_produces_same_tail ... ok
test sqlite_parity::stream_read_order_is_identical ... ok

test result: ok. 16 passed; 0 failed; 0 ignored; 0 measured; 0 filtered out; finished in 0.02s passes, the  failure is gone, and you leave proof or an exact blocker. Relevant files: crates/cairn-store/tests/cross_backend_parity.rs, crates/cairn-store/src/in_memory.rs, crates/cairn-store/src/sqlite/adapter.rs, crates/cairn-store/src/sqlite/projections.rs, crates/cairn-store/BACKFILL_ASSUMPTIONS.md.
